briefdescription.para: Define whether a node is operand or operator.
Raw name of node as it was specified in input text, i.e., including type marker.
Parsed name, i.e., a potential type marker (first character) is removed.
if a node is operator, it defines which one
if a node is operand, it defines which one

memberdef.argsstring: (Type t, std::string raw, std::string name, OperatorType operator_t)
memberdef.name: FormulaNode

memberdef.argsstring: (Type t, std::string raw, std::string name, OperandType operand)
memberdef.name: FormulaNode

briefdescription.para: A node of graph representing transition formula.

detaileddescription.para: A node could be operator (!,&,|) or operand (symbol, state, node). Each node has a name (in case of marking naming, an initial character defining type of node is removed and stored in name), raw (name including potential type marker), and information about its type.
